page_metadata.biotools__summary: A Python Mlst Local Search Tool. The input can be (i) an assembler-generated draft genome, (ii) the direct raw data, or (iii) other genomes stored in the sequence database.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A Python Mlst Local Search Tool. The input can be (i) an assembler-generated draft genome, (ii) the direct raw data, or (iii) other genomes stored in the sequence database.
